The '''''Yanov''''' was an [[Imperial Customs Frigate]] stolen by agents of the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] [[Vigo/Legends|Vigo]] [[Sprax]]. It was later used in an operation by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Sandwind Team (Sriluur)|Sandwind Team]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-07-XX -->''[[Secrets of the Sisar Run]]''
